title: Shingeki no Kyojin (Attack on Titan)
description: Shingeki no Kyojin (Attack on Titan) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to dive into the world of Attack on Titan.
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Attack_on_Titan/BH_Shingeki_no_Kyojin_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Attack_on_Titan/BH_Shingeki_no_Kyojin_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Attack_on_Titan/BH_Shingeki_no_Kyojin_overview.webp)
---

**Shingeki no Kyojin (Attack on Titan)** is a fantasy Modpack based on the anime/manga "Shingeki no Kyojin". Strap on your ODM gear a world lies beyond those walls! Fight and ride alongside comrades in the scout regiment but be careful, mindless titans aren't the only threat you will face in this vast world. With a progression system, unique animations and effects alongside a world teaming with life beyond the walls, get ready to traverse these lands or get swallowed by a titan...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/shingeki-no-kyojin)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/shingeki-no-kyojin)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Attack_on_Titan/BH_Shingeki_no_Kyojin_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **World Generation** - Bigger biomes, taller trees and flat plains, traverse a world truly like Shingeki no Kyojin.
- [✔️] **Custom animations** - Wait why is that player biting their hand? With unique movement and particle animations suited to AOT.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems, shaders too!
- [✔️] **Shingeki no Kyojin** - Your not alone in this world, titans roam these lands! Walls will only keep you safe for so long but everyone yearns for freedom... (perhaps traveling at night would be safer)

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Attack_on_Titan/BH_Shingeki_no_Kyojin_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
